requirement_topic.en: Networked Chargers, OCPP, EMC and FCC / IEC Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩、OCPP、EMC及FCC / IEC证据
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁、OCPP、EMC及FCC / IEC證據

summary.en: Belize has a nascent EV charging market, so OCPP back-office requirements are likely to be driven by tenders, site owners, charge-point operators, fleets, and payment providers rather than a single confirmed national EVSE platform rule. Networked chargers should still be prepared for OCPP interoperability, SIM / Ethernet routing, remote monitoring, payment integration, firmware updates, and cybersecurity requirements. EMC evidence should address a 60 Hz utility environment; FCC Part 15 practice is relevant for radio or digital devices in US-heritage equipment ecosystems, while IEC 61000 remains a useful international EMC and power-quality reference.
summary.zh: 伯利兹电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期阶段，因此OCPP后台要求较可能由招标、场地方、充电点运营商、车队和支付服务商驱动，而非单一已确认的全国EVSE平台规则。联网充电桩仍应准备OCPP互操作、SIM / 以太网路由、远程监控、支付集成、固件更新和网络安全要求。EMC证据应覆盖60 Hz公用电网环境；对于美国体系设备生态中的无线或数字设备，FCC Part 15实践具有相关性，IEC 61000仍是有用的国际EMC和电能质量参考。
summary.zht: 貝里斯電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期階段，因此OCPP後台要求較可能由招標、場地方、充電點運營商、車隊和支付服務商驅動，而非單一已確認的全國EVSE平台規則。聯網充電樁仍應準備OCPP互操作、SIM / 以太網路由、遠程監控、支付集成、固件更新和網絡安全要求。EMC證據應覆蓋60 Hz公用電網環境；對於美國體系設備生態中的無線或數字設備，FCC Part 15實務具有相關性，IEC 61000仍是有用的國際EMC和電能質量參考。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
FCC Part 15 — radio-frequency devices and unintentional radiators, US-direction EMC practice
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Project-specific CPO, fleet, payment, telecom, or site-owner network requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle BMS. That vehicle-side protocol is separate from OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS1 communication stack. China domestic EMC and communication evidence may be generated at 50 Hz and with China-market radio modules or operator back offices, so it is not automatically valid for Belize's 60 Hz, J1772 / CCS1, Americas-style deployment.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间。该车端协议不同于OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS1通信栈。中国国内EMC和通信证据可能基于50 Hz以及中国市场无线模块或运营商后台形成，因此不会自动适用于伯利兹60 Hz、J1772 / CCS1、美洲式部署。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間。該車端協議不同於OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS1通訊棧。中國國內EMC和通訊證據可能基於50 Hz以及中國市場無線模組或運營商後台形成，因此不會自動適用於貝里斯60 Hz、J1772 / CCS1、美洲式部署。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China-market radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, security profile, payment interface, SIM/router bands, remote diagnostics, data hosting, and offline behavior for the Belize project. For EMC, provide conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, surge, harmonic, flicker, and power-quality evidence at 60 Hz, plus FCC Part 15 or accepted equivalent evidence for embedded radio or digital modules where required. GB/T 27930 DC communication does not replace OCPP, CCS1 communication, or Belize project network acceptance.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认伯利兹项目所需的OCPP版本、安全配置、支付接口、SIM/路由器频段、远程诊断、数据托管和离线行为。EMC方面，应提供60 Hz下的传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、浪涌、谐波、闪烁及电能质量证据；如涉及嵌入式无线或数字模块，还应按要求提供FCC Part 15或可接受的等效证据。GB/T 27930直流通信不能替代OCPP、CCS1通信或伯利兹项目网络验收。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認貝里斯項目所需的OCPP版本、安全配置、支付接口、SIM/路由器頻段、遠程診斷、數據託管和離線行為。EMC方面，應提供60 Hz下的傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、浪湧、諧波、閃爍及電能質量證據；如涉及嵌入式無線或數字模組，還應按要求提供FCC Part 15或可接受的等效證據。GB/T 27930直流通訊不能替代OCPP、CCS1通訊或貝里斯項目網絡驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP and network acceptance are likely driven by CPO, fleet, payment, tender, or site-owner requirements; EMC evidence is required where specified by BBS, importer, project, or radio/digital module rules
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic vehicle-side DC charging protocol and is not a substitute for OCPP, CCS1 communication, or FCC / IEC EMC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Belize networked charger requirements will likely be project-led. Prepare OCPP, CCS1 communication, telecom, and FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence separately from GB/T 27930, and revalidate at 60 Hz before claiming Belize readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 伯利兹联网充电桩要求较可能由项目驱动。应将OCPP、CCS1通信、电信以及FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC证据与GB/T 27930分开准备，并在60 Hz下重新验证后再宣称伯利兹就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 貝里斯聯網充電樁要求較可能由項目驅動。應將OCPP、CCS1通訊、電信以及FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC證據與GB/T 27930分開準備，並在60 Hz下重新驗證後再宣稱貝里斯就緒。
